item.title: $100 Twin Fishing Challenge
item.description: Two anglers take on a budget-friendly fishing challenge, testing skill, strategy, and gear limits. Can they make the most of $100 on the water?

media:content.media:title: $100 Twin Fishing Challenge
media:content.media:description: Two anglers take on a budget-friendly fishing challenge, testing skill, strategy, and gear limits. Can they make the most of $100 on the water?

item.title: Twins Enjoy a Kayak Fishing Outing
item.description: A relaxing day on the water as two anglers head out for a kayak fishing outing, enjoying the outdoors and testing their skills. What’s your favorite way to fish?

media:content.media:title: Twins Enjoy a Kayak Fishing Outing
media:content.media:description: A relaxing day on the water as two anglers head out for a kayak fishing outing, enjoying the outdoors and testing their skills. What’s your favorite way to fish?

item.title: Cheap vs Expensive Fishing Challenge
item.description: A side-by-side test of budget and premium fishing gear to see how price affects performance on the water. Does spending more really make a difference?

media:content.media:title: Cheap vs Expensive Fishing Challenge
media:content.media:description: A side-by-side test of budget and premium fishing gear to see how price affects performance on the water. Does spending more really make a difference?

item.title: Buying a Private Lake: What It Takes
item.description: A look at the process of purchasing a private lake, including costs, maintenance, and long-term responsibilities. Would you take on a property like this?

media:content.media:title: Buying a Private Lake: What It Takes
media:content.media:description: A look at the process of purchasing a private lake, including costs, maintenance, and long-term responsibilities. Would you take on a property like this?

item.title: Fishing, then a bit of wakesurfing fun
item.description: A day on the water that ends with some wakesurfing before heading home.

media:content.media:title: Fishing, then a bit of wakesurfing fun
media:content.media:description: A day on the water that ends with some wakesurfing before heading home.

item.title: Target Shooting Event
item.description: A look at a target shooting event hosted outdoors, focusing on skill, safety, and friendly competition. What techniques would you use to improve accuracy?

media:content.media:title: Target Shooting Event
media:content.media:description: A look at a target shooting event hosted outdoors, focusing on skill, safety, and friendly competition. What techniques would you use to improve accuracy?
